privacy.notes: Synthetic metadata-only contract. Source tables, proprietary mapping payloads, grouping logic, and production extracts are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: list_emergency_code_mapping_bundles
commands.notes: List synthetic mapping bundle manifests for UDG and AECC target windows without embedding source tables or code rows.

commands.name: validate_emergency_code_mapping_bundle
commands.notes: Validate that a bundle declares supported source fields, target classification, pricing-year window, provenance, and checksums.

commands.name: emit_emergency_code_mapping_dry_run
commands.notes: Produce a dry-run summary of mapped, unmapped, deprecated, invalid, and version-incompatible records without changing source data.

commands.name: describe_no_proprietary_payload_boundary
commands.notes: Declare the no-proprietary-payload boundary for synthetic fixtures and confirm restricted source content stays excluded.

commands.name: resolve_local_external_mapping_reference
commands.notes: Record a user-supplied local-only external mapping placeholder without bundling the restricted mapping table itself.

mapping_bundle_manifest_schema.description: Versioned manifest shape for emergency code mapping bundles. Each manifest is metadata only and declares the source field set, target classification, year window, provenance, checksums, and validation status.

field_definitions.name: bundle_id
field_definitions.purpose: Stable identifier for the mapping bundle.

field_definitions.name: bundle_version
field_definitions.purpose: Bundle release version used for deterministic diffing.

field_definitions.name: target_classification
field_definitions.purpose: Declared target classification, such as UDG or AECC.

field_definitions.name: pricing_years
field_definitions.purpose: Supported pricing-year windows for the bundle.

field_definitions.name: source_fields
field_definitions.purpose: Declared source emergency-care fields that feed the mapping pipeline.

field_definitions.name: source_field_set_version
field_definitions.purpose: Version label for the declared source field set.

field_definitions.name: provenance
field_definitions.purpose: Metadata for source manifest paths, source URLs, retrieval date, and local-only reference location.

field_definitions.name: checksums
field_definitions.purpose: Checksums for the manifest and any user-supplied local reference metadata.

field_definitions.name: validation_status
field_definitions.purpose: Declared validation state such as pass, fail, or unknown.

mapping_bundle_record_types.label: Mapping bundle manifest
mapping_bundle_record_types.purpose: Metadata-only declaration of a versioned emergency mapping bundle, including source field set, target class, validity years, and provenance.

mapping_bundle_record_types.label: Mapping bundle summary
mapping_bundle_record_types.purpose: Synthetic dry-run summary of mapped, unmapped, deprecated, invalid, and version-incompatible records.

mapping_bundle_record_types.label: Diagnostic record
mapping_bundle_record_types.purpose: Synthetic diagnostics for version, field, provenance, and boundary checks.

mapping_bundle_record_types.label: No proprietary payload boundary record
mapping_bundle_record_types.purpose: Explicit boundary declaration for fixtures that must not contain proprietary mapping payloads, source code rows, or production exports.

mapping_bundle_record_types.label: Local mapping reference
mapping_bundle_record_types.purpose: Local placeholder for a user-supplied mapping table, file, or service endpoint.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only bundle
compatibility_rules.description: Reject bundles that embed proprietary mapping payloads, source code rows, or grouping logic.

compatibility_rules.label: Explicit bundle version
compatibility_rules.description: Require each bundle to declare a stable version and supported pricing-year window.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared source field set
compatibility_rules.description: Require each manifest to declare the source emergency-care fields it maps from.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared target classification
compatibility_rules.description: Require each bundle to declare whether it targets UDG or AECC outputs.

compatibility_rules.label: No implicit crosswalk
compatibility_rules.description: Do not infer UDG or AECC mappings unless a declared source bundle or local reference is present.

compatibility_rules.label: Checksum required
compatibility_rules.description: Require source-manifest or local-reference checksums so synthetic fixtures remain diffable and auditable.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared payload boundary
compatibility_rules.description: Require every fixture bundle to declare that proprietary payloads, licensed tables, and restricted exports are absent.

compatibility_rules.label: Local-only external reference
compatibility_rules.description: Record external mapping assets only as local placeholders and do not bundle restricted content.

examples.name: mapping-bundle-manifest
examples.description: Synthetic versioned manifest covering UDG and AECC mapping bundles with checksums, source fields, and provenance.

examples.name: dry-run-mapping-summary
examples.description: Synthetic dry-run summary showing mapped, unmapped, deprecated, invalid, and version-incompatible records.

examples.name: diagnostics
examples.description: Synthetic diagnostics report for boundary, provenance, unknown-code, and validation checks.

examples.name: local-only-external-mapping-placeholder
examples.description: Synthetic local-only placeholder for a user-supplied external mapping table or service.

examples.name: no-proprietary-payload-boundary
examples.description: Synthetic boundary declaration that excludes proprietary payloads and restricted mappings.
